results.rendered_html:
anapāya a.
1 Free from loss or decay.
2 Imperishable, undiminished, undecaying; praṇamaṃtyanapāyamutthitaṃ ( caṃdraṃ)  Ki. 2. 11. 
— yaḥ
1 Imperishable nature, freedom from decay or wear and tear; permanence.
2 N. of Śiva.
